response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT 
  mca.yr_mth,
  SUM(mca.ord_cnt) as agg_ord_cnt,
  COUNT(DISTINCT oh.ord_id) as fact_ord_cnt,
  SUM(mca.ord_cnt) - COUNT(DISTINCT oh.ord_id) as reconcile_diff
FROM mth_cust_agg mca
LEFT JOIN ord_hdr oh ON mca.cust_id = oh.cust_id 
  AND mca.yr_mth = TO_CHAR(oh.ord_dt, 'YYYY-MM')
  AND oh.sts_cd != 'CANCELLED'
GROUP BY mca.yr_mth
ORDER BY mca.yr_mth;",
  "reason": null
}
```
